zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel d'Aubigny於大約1196年出生在英國素可阿盧德爾時，她的父親William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny24歲，母親Mabel de Chester25歲。她於大約1220年與John FitzAlan I在英國英格蘭素可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1240年之前在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel d'Aubigny于大约1196年出生在英国素可阿盧德爾时，她的父亲William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny24岁，母亲Mabel de Chester25岁。她于大约1220年与John FitzAlan I在英国英格兰素可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1240年之前在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel d'Aubigny was born about 1196, in Arundel, Sussex, England, her father, William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny, was 24 and her mother, Mabel de Chester, was 25. She married John FitzAlan I about 1220, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died before 1240, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel d'Aubigny est née environ 1196, à Arundel, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Mabel de Chester, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé John FitzAlan I environ 1220, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 1240, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel d'Aubigny um 1196 in Arundel, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny 24 und ihre Mutter Mabel de Chester 25. Sie hat um 1220 in Sussex, England, United Kingdom John FitzAlan I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 1240 in ihrem Geburtsort.

Lei sposato John FitzAlan I circa 1220, nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 1240, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel d'Aubignyが約1196年にイギリススセックスアルンデルで生まれた時，父William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubignyは24歳，母Mabel de Chesterは25歳であった。約1220年にイギリスイギリススセックスでJohn FitzAlan Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1240年以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel d'Aubigny(이)가 대략 1196년 영국 수세스 아런들에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabel de Chester(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 John FitzAlan I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1240년 이전 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com John FitzAlan I aproximadamente 1220, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 1240, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel d'Aubigny родилась около 1196 г. в местности арундель, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mabel de Chester, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John FitzAlan I около 1220 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 1240 г. в её родном городе.
